Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
S
Sarah M.

Jbc Construction did an amazing job on our kitchen remodel! They listened to our ideas and helped us create a beautiful and functional space. The team was professional, courteous, and always on time. We highly recommend them!

J
John B.

We hired Jbc Construction to finish our basement, and we're very happy with the results. They transformed a dark, unfinished space into a comfortable and inviting living area. There were a couple of minor hiccups along the way, but they were quick to address them. Overall, a great experience.

E
Emily K.

Jbc Construction completely transformed our outdated bathroom into a modern oasis. The quality of their work is exceptional, and their attention to detail is impressive. They were also very respectful of our home and kept the work area clean.

D
David L.

We love our new deck built by Jbc Construction! It's the perfect space for entertaining and relaxing. The team was professional, efficient, and always willing to answer our questions. We highly recommend them for any outdoor construction projects.

Additional General Contractor Services

Kitchen Remodeling Bathroom Remodeling Basement Finishing Deck & Patio Construction

Jbc Construction — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every general contractor project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Jbc Construction Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific general contractor needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Wichita & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Wichita, KS and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Wichita Andover Derby Goddard Maize Haysville Park City Valley Center
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our general contractor services.

How long does a kitchen remodel typically take?

The duration of a kitchen remodel varies depending on the scope of the project, but typically ranges from 4 to 8 weeks.

Do I need to move out during the remodel?

While it's not always necessary, it's often more convenient to move out during the demolition and construction phases.

How much does a kitchen remodel cost?

The cost of a kitchen remodel depends on the size and complexity of the project, as well as the materials used. We provide detailed estimates upfront to avoid surprises.

Built on Wichita Values

Contact Jbc Construction for a free consultation and let's discuss your project.

Let's Begin →
